description_long: This object is a polygonal barrel with a distinctly blocky, faceted appearance, reminiscent of stylized or voxel-based urban props. The barrel is primarily a warm orange-brown color, with a prominent yellowish band encircling its midsection, suggesting structural reinforcement or decorative banding. The top of the barrel is flat and slightly inset, indicating the presence of a fitted lid. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the surface is uniformly colored with no visible text, symbols, or markings except for a single black rectangle on one side, possibly representing a slot or label area. The overall form is squat and robust, suitable for use as a storage or containment vessel in urban environments such as streets, alleys, or garages. The material appears to be a hard, matte plastic or painted metal, giving it durability for outdoor or semi-industrial use.
description: A blocky, orange-brown barrel with a yellow band around its middle and a flat, inset lid. The surface is matte and unmarked except for a single black rectangle on one side.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from a side angle, showing the orange-brown body and the yellow band wrapping around the middle.
description_view_1: This view highlights the flat, slightly raised lid and the uninterrupted yellow band, with no visible markings.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the barrel, similar to view 0, with the yellow band and orange-brown body clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the side with a distinct black rectangle on the yellow band, possibly a label or slot.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: yellow plastic reinforcement ring around midsection
